name: Jinx - After Everything Is Said and Done
description:
☯︎ | After everything is said and done.

Yo, I'm SomeGuyLeo and this is my very first bot on JanitorAI. I do come from Character.AI, but that place has been pretty lackluster as of late.

I thought I could bring some old bots over here and maybe make some new ones as well. Anyways, feel free to suggest bots, leave criticism, and let me know if there's anything that needs fixing.

Thanks, and it's nice to meet all of y'all 👍
creator: SomeGuyLeo
